nasb.text: He will sing to men and say, ‘I have sinned and perverted what is right, And it is not proper for me.

esv.text: He sings before men and says: ‘I sinned and perverted what was right, and it was not repaid to me.

cnv.text: 他在人面前歌唱，說： ‘我犯了罪，顛倒是非， 但我沒有受到應得的報應。

ccb.text: 他会当众歌唱说， ‘我犯了罪，颠倒是非， 祂却没有按我的罪报应我。
